title: China tells at-risk people to undergo cancer screening
summary_full: China's health ministry is urging individuals aged 50 and above, smokers, and those with a family history of lung cancer to get annual low-dose CT scans. This initiative is part of a national campaign to significantly enhance cancer prevention and control efforts by the year 2030, aiming for broader public health improvements.
